blocks.en: Wi-Fi has siblings. The IEEE 802 family is a set of related networking standards, each owning a slice of the local-network world. Knowing the map helps you place any term you meet.
blocks.zh: Wi-Fi 有许多“兄弟姐妹”。IEEE 802 家族是一组相关的组网标准，各自负责局域网世界的一块。掌握这张地图，能帮你给遇到的任何术语定位。

blocks.en:
mindmap
  root((IEEE 802))
    802.11 Wi-Fi
    802.1 Bridging / TSN
    802.15 PAN
      Bluetooth-class
      Zigbee
    802.19 Coexistence
blocks.zh:
mindmap
  root((IEEE 802))
    802.11 Wi-Fi
    802.1 桥接 / TSN
    802.15 PAN 个域网
      蓝牙类
      Zigbee
    802.19 共存

blocks.en: This course's spine is 802.11 (Wi-Fi). The other tracks — 802.1 bridging/time-sensitive networking, 802.15 personal-area networks, 802.19 coexistence — are Wi-Fi's neighbours and get their own tracks later.
blocks.zh: 本课程的主线是 802.11（Wi-Fi）。其他轨道——802.1 桥接/时间敏感网络、802.15 个域网、802.19 共存——是 Wi-Fi 的邻居，稍后各自成轨。

blocks.en: IEEE Std 802 itself is the overview-and-architecture document: it defines the LAN/MAN reference model and how the individual 802.x standards relate to each other.
blocks.zh: IEEE Std 802 本身是“概述与体系结构”文档：它定义了 LAN/MAN 参考模型，以及各个 802.x 标准之间的关系。
